name: landspitali-powerbi-router-production-v1
description: Production v1.0.1 package for Landspítali public Power BI router and tracker, with installation guide and tracker binding hardening.

scripts.smoke: node --check assets/router-core.v20260607-1.js && node --check tracker/powerbi_router_tracker_apps_script_v1.js && node --check status-dashboard/assets/status-dashboard.js && node tests/smoke-test.mjs
